big_picture: India's Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed the ongoing Iran-Israel conflict, stating that India will continue to work with nations in the Middle East to ensure the safety of its citizens. The opposition Congress party has criticized Modi's handling of the crisis. Meanwhile, India has strengthened its ties with Canada, with the two nations signing agreements on rare earth and uranium. PM Modi also met with Canadian counterpart Mark Carney, further solidifying bilateral relations.
